title: Enqueue ActionHook Payload
description: Payload sent to the enqueue actionHook when the enqueue verb completes — i.e. the call was bridged, abandoned, left the queue, or an error occurred.

queue_time.description: Time in seconds the caller spent waiting in the queue.

queue_result.description: Outcome of the enqueue. 'bridged' — call was dequeued and connected; 'hangup' — caller hung up while waiting; 'leave' — caller executed a leave verb from the waitHook; 'error' — an error occurred during bridging.
